docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $300.00 FILED BY RENT-A-CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT FLINT THELMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-17-1992 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 05
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FLINT THELMA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RENT-A-CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLINT THELMA $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $37.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $337.50, WITH RETURN OF PROPERTY $1800.00 IF PROPERTY NOT RETURNED STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
